description: Style Note Super soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game! Product Details Brown wallet that has a zipped closure, flap on the left with a buttoned closure, two insert pockets with eight card holders on the inside of the flap, a zipped pocket with four card holders on one side and an id card holder on the other side, a buttoned pocket on the front with branding on a metallic badge Material and Care Vintage leather Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Dimensions: 10.5 cm x 14.5 cm
